---
title: imports-blocklist
description: "Reject configured imports."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🟡 `warning`

Reject configured imports. Strider default: empty blocklist.

## Bad

```go
import "log" // when log is configured as blocked
```

## Good

```go
import "log/slog"
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only imports-blocklist`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
